raw_text: Blinkit is the most convenient for grocery shopping and other stuffs. Even I prefer blinkit over other apps. It should include more stuffs like clothing and accessories.

very disappointed with the product and service. there is no service after sales. and the support team is helpless. they are bounded with their policy so they can't help their customer. Even if the customer is facing issues with the product and delivery guy.

While ordering, I selected the delivery address as my home but the app automatically kept changing the address to my office based on location and this happened multiple times and I accidentally placed 3 orders at my office address which I required at home. while 1 address was delivered at office and I accepted (though it was not required), I cancelled the other 2 orders and I was charged cancellation charges also but still the refund was not given.

LOVING the shopping experience in this app 😁 especially the huge range of products mainly the imported ones! 🛍️ & the on time delivery is very appealing 🚚 lastly extremely HAPPY with the Cash on delivery payment option! ❣️

changing from last review to a step up. Using services in vrindavan. service is good on delivery front , but product refilling is taking lot of time. for days , we don't find items required get refilled back quickly. overall improving. please avoid storing and sending stale products. overall a satisfying experience.

I had a great experience with Blinkit. My order was delivered very quickly, and all the items were fresh and well-packed. The app was easy to use, and the delivery partner was polite and professional. Overall, I am very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Blinkit to others.😊

Received expired products multiple times. Dissatisfied with Support all time. Makes us hassle for exchange/return for the expired products they sent. Frustrating. New update: still disappointed by blinkit. there's no way to pass by AI support to talk to human agent and their AI support is not at all helpful.

really fast and good items we get,fresh items BTW the delivery partners are really sweet,it's really helpful in urgent times and someone arrives suddenly! Overall,it's really helpful and good quality of fruits,snacks,vegetables and ice-creams.....nice for everyday needs and this app is LEGIT PERFECT and I LITERALLY LOVE IT........ Also it's with no ADS and the delivery boys come really easily navigating the address....

It is a good and useful app.But the problem is it can't get cancelled.And I am giving the rating of 4.Because it doesn't have an option of 'Cancel order'.I want to say to the boss of the company,that to put an option of cancel button.It can be more useful for everyone.

it was good at first but then the delivery people stopped carrying change with them i know for people that may not be much of an issue but for students like me, or people like me it is. please tell them to carry change. its very inconvinient. thank you. i hope you solve this issue.

the app works smooth, but recently i noticed laging in the previously order section, the mini browsing section is good but idk why it laggs sometimes, the app looks decent design wise. you can add a feature that can use AI to suggest ingredient of the dish or small repairs products to help out even more. update - the checkout section slightly lagging idk why, i am using a s25 so probably its not the device.

They are not delivering in our area as there is no lift. This is a very smart strategy by the company who is focusing on profits rather than service. But by doing this, they are losing customers. Every app when it's new will always try to pull and impress the customers with their service. But as soon as they start making profits, they forget about service. This app is pathetic. They're not delivering. Worst app !!!

waste of money , with four droplets of rain they either get unavailable or start asking surge fee i stopped ordering from these platforms for last 3 months and I can say that it's better to go buy themselves rather than depending on these platform . because as I said in emergency when it's raining or something they get unavailable mostly or surge fee lol just taking advantage of someone's emergency situation it's not like distance will increase while it's raining .

I have had great experience in the past with Blinkit. However, off late I have been experiencing problems with missing items in the delivery. Customer care chats were hopeless and some of the customer care agents were just plain rude and did not help resolve the issue at all. The very reason why Blinkit succeeded is because of the timely and efficient service. If that is missing, then there is no point.

Good purpose. but bad system. ice creams are ALWAYS melted. vegetables are mostly rotten. and packets of mattha (buttermilk) were sometimes received with expiry the very next day. some very old products are received with even the expiry date withering unable to be seen and covered completely in dust. Always check your items. good thing is that they refund or redeliver items if bad but i seriously want them to take their rotten and bad quality products back. I dont want rotten products.....

Do not download it 🫢, yes it is a very good app and it is very helpful but I spend more than I earn just because of convenience if I was going to buy 50 rupees thing I end up buying more than I intend to buy 🫪. and more than shopping I am spending on this so it is kind of embarrassing.🫠 ... overall the app is good.😄

Terrible service! They made me wait for over an hour for my delivery. When I contacted support to check on it, they casually told me they were facing technical issues and asked me to cancel the order myself. If they can't deliver, they shouldn't take orders. Pathetic customer service.

This app is worst now-a-days it's says currently unavailable. Even whenever I wanted to order something it says unavailable to my area. So for your convenience I need to change my address or my home... Thank you Blinkit.

they are not able cancel even a single order .If I had ordered twice because it is shows in app single item the owner is just idiot they bunch of cork without thinking about customer i have another option like big basket, zepto even zepto is better than this app .🗣🗣🗣 🤬🤬🤬

Their software glitch sold me a different item than what was shown. When i checked what i ordered they've miraculously changed it to whatever they sent me. I don't know if it was an intentional "glitch" by the company. I'll simply visit the local store instead of ordering from blinkit. No more business with Blinkit.
